External TextMate plist fixtures used by `tools/check_integrations.sh`.

`JavaScriptNextJSON.tmLanguage` is copied from the MIT-licensed
`Benvie/JavaScriptNext.tmLanguage` grammar:

https://github.com/Benvie/JavaScriptNext.tmLanguage/blob/master/JSON%20(JavaScriptNext).tmLanguage

The copied license text is in `LICENSE-JAVASCRIPTNEXT`.

`GitCommit.tmLanguage` is copied from the MIT-licensed
`textmate/git.tmbundle` grammar:

https://github.com/textmate/git.tmbundle/blob/master/Syntaxes/Git%20Commit%20Message.tmLanguage

The copied license text is in `LICENSE-GIT-TMBUNDLE`.

`Diff.tmLanguage` is copied from the permissively licensed
`textmate/diff.tmbundle` grammar:

https://github.com/textmate/diff.tmbundle/blob/master/Syntaxes/Diff.plist

The copied license text is in `LICENSE-DIFF-TMBUNDLE`.

`Ada.tmLanguage`, `ANTLR.tmLanguage`, `Apache.tmLanguage`, `DOT.tmLanguage`,
and `Ini.tmLanguage` are copied from upstream TextMate bundle grammars:

https://github.com/textmate/ada.tmbundle/blob/master/Syntaxes/Ada.plist
https://github.com/textmate/antlr.tmbundle/blob/master/Syntaxes/ANTLR.plist
https://github.com/textmate/apache.tmbundle/blob/master/Syntaxes/Apache.plist
https://github.com/textmate/graphviz.tmbundle/blob/master/Syntaxes/DOT.plist
https://github.com/textmate/ini.tmbundle/blob/master/Syntaxes/Ini.plist

The copied license text is in `LICENSE-TEXTMATE-BUNDLES`.
